cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates are selected based on the highest scores from the shortlist, reflecting strong likelihood. The digits align well with the most frequent digits per position: position 1 (4,3,2), position 2 (6,3,5), position 3 (3,9,6), position 4 (4,1,5), position 5 (9,2,0), position 6 (1,0,7), and position 7 (9,3,0). The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers and form a subset of the top50, ensuring consistency and adherence to frequency patterns.
